name: VirnetX Holding Corp
summary: VirnetX Holding Corp is a company focused on commercializing its patent portfolio related to secure communications and virtual private network (VPN) technologies. The company pursues licensing agreements and litigation to monetize its intellectual property, which covers technologies for establishing secure domain-based communications networks and real-time communication links.
